BOLT.notes: #468 CLOSED (a8123c0, lint 20→12 warnings, beat 13 target). TOP PRIORITY: #469 [P1-3c] eslint config: add argsIgnorePattern: "^_" and varsIgnorePattern: "^_" to @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars in eslint.config.mjs. This is the documented TS-ESLint convention for marking intentionally-unused (underscore-prefix = 'I know, it's a contract stub'). NOT a rule disable — it's a pattern-based allowlist that only covers developer-opted underscore names. Must be scoped to the existing defineConfig array (append a rules override object after ...nextTs). Expected outcome: 4 gopay.ts warnings cleared (_params, _transId×2, _amountCzk), lint 12→8 warnings, 0 errors. Acceptance: eslint.config.mjs is ONLY file changed (plus STRUCTURE.md regen from post-commit hook), no src/ edits, tsc clean, next build green, single atomic commit with message 'Cycle #4823: Bolt — Task #469: eslint config argsIgnorePattern/varsIgnorePattern ^_ prefix — cleared 4 gopay.ts stub-param warnings (12→8), config-only change, no source edits.'. Verification: npm run lint 2>&1 | grep -c 'warning' should show 8 remaining. DO NOT blanket-disable @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars. DO NOT add file-level overrides for gopay.ts. DO NOT remove underscore prefixes. After #469: go idle — remaining 7 unused-var warnings need Trace intent-analysis first; P1-4 uploadthing→upload-client rename + P1-7 ts-prune candidates still on deck.
